title: fix: hide github_custom from Polly API mode
author: its3li
pr_body_excerpt:
## Summary
- remove github_custom from Polly HTTP API mode tools
- keep Discord/admin Polly behavior unchanged
- update the API-mode tool prompt to match the filtered tool list

## Why
Polly API requests run with the caller's Pollinations key, but github_custom performs GitHub API GETs with Polly's configured GitHub App/PAT token. API users should not be able to use the public Polly model as a raw GitHub token-backed read proxy.

## Verification
- python -m compileall apps/polly/src/constants.py
- direct filter assertion confirmed github_custom is excluded from API mode tools

gist.headline: Toolbox cleanup
gist.blurb: We've fine-tuned Polly's API mode tools to keep the hive secure and running smoothly.
gist.summary: Removed the github_custom tool from Polly's HTTP API mode to prevent unintended GitHub API proxying via internal tokens.
gist.impact: The github_custom tool is no longer accessible via the public Polly API, though Discord and admin access remains fully supported.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee wearing a tiny toolbelt, organizing a glowing digital toolbox and safely locking away a specific tool.
